title: Online Dating | #shorts
full_text: my husband he's a really smart guy he went to a great college has a good job he's what you would call a catch I know this because his mother reminds me every day and and I get asked a lot were you guys arranged we were going to be but then online dating was really new 24 years ago and we found each other online so his mom was so mad at him my dad was so upset you know a match made in heaven neither side of the family spoke to us for a long time we refer to that as the honeymoon period
